title: alaticaulia pyxis
side_effects: Alaticaulia pyxis can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, diarrhea, and vomiting, due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts can also lead to neurological problems, including dizziness, confusion, and in severe cases, seizures. Furthermore, improper use of the plant may cause an allergic reaction, resulting in skin irritation, itching, and in rare cases, anaphylaxis. In extreme cases, excessive consumption of the plant can lead to respiratory failure and even death.
